scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @support/shared && npm run build --workspace @support/webapp
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --app-dir apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace @support/webapp"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @support/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @support/webapp
